prompt: A 360-degree equirectangular anime-style VR bedroom scene viewed from a first-person perspective on a bed, with a young adult woman leaning very close toward the viewer in the center of the frame. She has medium brown hair in a smooth bob with side-swept bangs, small earrings, and wears a fitted slate blue button-up blouse with the top buttons open and matching dark blue pants. Her pose is intimate and immersive: kneeling and straddling over the viewer on a rumpled white bed, one arm extended forward toward the camera and the other bracing on the mattress, as if reaching out inside a VR experience. The room is a warm, softly lit modern bedroom with beige walls and recessed ceiling lights, a dark wooden door on the left, a TV on a low dresser, a second dresser with framed photos, a centered window with sheer white curtains and darker gray drapes, two bedside tables with glowing lamps, one tall potted plant near the window, and one dark wooden bookshelf on the right. Include exactly 2 framed wall pictures, 2 bedside lamps, 2 potted plants, 2 dressers, 1 TV, 1 bookshelf, 1 door, and 1 window. Use a panoramic ultra-wide 360 VR distortion with curved walls and stretched bed edges, polished anime rendering, soft warm evening lighting, detailed bedding folds, clean interior design, and a realistic virtual-tour atmosphere.
